name: impeccable
description: Design fluency for frontend development. One skill with 23 commands and curated anti-pattern detection.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend design craft, critique, polish, and anti-pattern detection for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Impeccable brings Codex a production-grade frontend design workflow: 23 design commands, deep visual guidance, browser-aware live iteration scripts, and deterministic anti-pattern detection for HTML, CSS, and app surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use Impeccable to critique this interface.
Use Impeccable to polish this frontend.
Use Impeccable to audit UI anti-patterns.
